Query.Sql: -- COSDv9HN ProcedureOccurrence: PrimaryProcedureOPCS -- Extracts the primary OPCS procedure code for Head and Neck cancer from COSD v9. -- Maps to procedure_occurrence.procedure_source_value (OPCS-4 code). -- ProcedureDate maps to procedure_occurrence.procedure_date (string format CCYY-MM-DD, to be cast in later ETL step). -- NHSNumber used to link to the person table via NHS number lookup. with hn as ( select distinct Record ->> '$.HeadNeck.HeadNeckCore.HeadNeckCoreLinkagePatientId.NHSNumber.@extension' as NHSNumber, unnest ([[Record ->> '$.HeadNeck.HeadNeckCore.HeadNeckCoreTreatment.HeadNeckCoreSurgeryAndOtherProcedures.ProcedureDate'], Record ->> '$.HeadNeck.HeadNeckCore.HeadNeckCoreTreatment[*].HeadNeckCoreSurgeryAndOtherProcedures.ProcedureDate'], recursive := true) as ProcedureDate, unnest ([[Record ->> '$.HeadNeck.HeadNeckCore.HeadNeckCoreTreatment.HeadNeckCoreSurgeryAndOtherProcedures.PrimaryProcedureOPCS.@code'], Record ->> '$.HeadNeck.HeadNeckCore.HeadNeckCoreTreatment[*].HeadNeckCoreSurgeryAndOtherProcedures.PrimaryProcedureOPCS.@code'], recursive := true) as PrimaryProcedureOPCS from omop_staging.cosd_staging_901 where type = 'HN' ) select distinct NHSNumber, ProcedureDate, PrimaryProcedureOPCS from hn where NHSNumber is not null and PrimaryProcedureOPCS is not null;

Explanation.Description: NHS NUMBER is the primary identifier for a person or patient in NHS England and Wales.
Date relevant to the activity for the procedure date.
OPCS Classification of Interventions and Procedures code used to identify the primary patient procedure carried out.
